title: Average air temperature sensor
abstract: A temperature sensor includes a housing and a temperature responsive element. The housing includes a plurality of channels, a mixing chamber, an interior surface, and an outlet passage. The plurality of channels is configured to receive a fluid at an inlet. The mixing chamber is fluidly connected to the plurality of channels. The mixing chamber is configured to receive the fluid from the plurality of channels. The interior surface is adjacent to the mixing chamber. The interior surface is configured to direct air toward a sensing region. The outlet passage is fluidly connected to the mixing chamber and disposed downstream of the sensing region. The outlet passage is configured to receive the fluid from the mixing chamber and discharge the fluid from the housing. The temperature responsive element is disposed in the sensing region.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1 . A temperature sensor comprising: a base comprising a first base portion comprising: a front surface; a first interior surface disposed at a first angle with respect to the front surface; a second interior surface adjacent to the first interior surface and forming a second angle with respect to the first interior surface; a baffle plane substantially parallel to the front surface of the base and disposed between the front surface and the second interior surface; and a plurality of baffles, each baffle extending from a front plane defined by the front surface to the baffle plane and substantially parallel to the first interior surface; a cover fixed to the base; an interior compartment at least partially defined by the cover and the base and having a first interior compartment portion, the first interior compartment portion comprising: a mixing chamber at least partially defined by the first interior surface, the second interior surface, and the baffle plane; and a first sensing region adjacent to the mixing chamber; and a temperature responsive element at least partially disposed in the first sensing region. 2. The temperature sensor of claim 1 , wherein the first angle is greater than or equal 40Â° and less than or equal to 50Â°. 3. The temperature sensor of claim 2, wherein the first angle is 45Â°. 4. The temperature sensor of claim 1 , wherein the second angle is greater than or equal to 135Â° and less than or equal to 145Â°. 5. The temperature sensor of claim 4, wherein the second angle is 140Â°. 6. The temperature sensor of claim 1 , further comprising: a second base portion adjacent to and integrally formed with the first base portion, wherein the second base portion is a mirror image of the first base portion about an intermediate plane parallel to the baffle plane and opposite the front plane; and a second interior compartment portion adjacent to the first interior compartment portion, wherein the second interior compartment portion is a mirror image of the first interior compartment portion about the intermediate plane. 7. The temperature sensor of claim 6, wherein the second interior compartment includes a second sensing region and the first interior compartment portion is fluidly connected to the second interior compartment portion at respective first and second sensing regions. 8. The temperature sensor of claim 1 , wherein the temperature responsive element is a negative temperature coefficient (NTC) thermistor. 9. A temperature sensor comprising: a housing comprising: a plurality of channels configured to receive a fluid at an inlet; a mixing chamber fluidly connected to the plurality of channels and configured to receive the fluid from the plurality of channels; an interior surface adjacent to the mixing chamber, the interior surface configured direct air toward a sensing region; and an outlet passage fluidly connected to the mixing chamber and disposed downstream of the sensing region configured to receive the fluid from the mixing chamber and discharge the fluid from the housing; and a temperature responsive element disposed in the sensing region. 10. The temperature sensor of claim 9, wherein the temperature responsive element comprises a negative temperature coefficient (NTC) thermistor. 1 1 . The temperature sensor of claim 9, wherein the housing further comprises a plurality of baffles, each baffle including a pair of opposing side walls, and each side wall at least partially defining one channel of the plurality of channels. 12. The temperature sensor of claim 1 1 , wherein each baffle extends from a side of the housing to a baffle plane parallel to the side and disposed between the side and the interior surface so that the plurality of baffles is spaced apart from the interior surface to define the mixing chamber. 13. The temperature sensor of claim 12, wherein each baffle forms a first angle with a side of the housing. 14. The temperature sensor of claim 13, wherein each baffle forms a second angle with respect to the interior surface. 15. The temperature sensor of claim 14, wherein the first angle is greater than or equal to 40Â° and less than or equal to 50Â°. 16. The temperature sensor of claim 15, wherein the second angle is greater than or equal to 135Â° and less than or equal to 145Â°. 17. The temperature sensor of claim 9, wherein the temperature responsive element is configured to sense an average temperature of the fluid. 18. A temperature sensor comprising: a body; and a plate extending from the body, wherein the plate comprises a material having a high thermal conductivity; and a temperature responsive element disposed against a surface of the plate and the temperature responsive element is configured to sense an average temperature of a fluid. 19. The temperature sensor of claim 18, wherein the plate has a high thermal conductivity of greater than or equal to 150 W/m -K at 0Â°C. 20. The temperature sensor of claim 18, wherein the plate has a high thermal conductivity of greater than or equal to 200 W/m -K at 0Â°C. 21 . The temperature sensor of claim 20, wherein the plate comprises aluminum (Al). 22. The temperature sensor of claim 21 , wherein the temperature responsive element comprises a negative temperature coefficient (NTC) thermistor. 23.
